# Domain State Machines (Generated)

Version: `1`
Updated: `2026-03-26`

## WORLD-STATE-COMMIT
- Domain: world-state
- Initial: DRAFTED
- States: DRAFTED, VALIDATED, COMMITTED, REJECTED
- Source Rules: R-WSTATE-002, R-WSTATE-005
- Transitions:
  - DRAFTED -> VALIDATED on `validate-pass`
  - DRAFTED -> REJECTED on `validate-fail`
  - VALIDATED -> COMMITTED on `commit`
  - VALIDATED -> REJECTED on `auth-fail`

## WORLD-HISTORY-APPEND
- Domain: world-history
- Initial: PREPARED
- States: PREPARED, APPENDED, REJECTED, INVALIDATED
- Source Rules: R-WHIST-002, R-WHIST-005
- Transitions:
  - PREPARED -> APPENDED on `append`
  - PREPARED -> REJECTED on `reject`
  - APPENDED -> INVALIDATED on `invalidate`

## TRANSIT-SESSION
- Domain: transit
- Initial: PENDING
- States: PENDING, ACTIVE, COMPLETED, ABANDONED
- Source Rules: R-TRANSIT-003
- Transitions:
  - PENDING -> ACTIVE on `start`
  - ACTIVE -> COMPLETED on `complete`
  - PENDING -> ABANDONED on `cancel`
  - ACTIVE -> ABANDONED on `cancel`

## RESOURCE-LIFECYCLE
- Domain: resource
- Initial: PENDING
- States: PENDING, READY, FAILED, DELETED
- Source Rules: R-RSRC-003
- Transitions:
  - PENDING -> READY on `finalize`
  - PENDING -> FAILED on `fail`
  - READY -> DELETED on `delete`
  - FAILED -> DELETED on `delete`

## OWNABLE-ASSET-LIFECYCLE
- Domain: asset
- Initial: DRAFT
- States: DRAFT, READY, ARCHIVED, DELETED
- Source Rules: R-ASSET-103
- Transitions:
  - DRAFT -> READY on `publish-ready`
  - READY -> ARCHIVED on `archive`
  - DRAFT -> DELETED on `delete`
  - READY -> DELETED on `delete`
  - ARCHIVED -> DELETED on `delete`

## BUNDLE-LIFECYCLE
- Domain: bundle
- Initial: DRAFT
- States: DRAFT, PUBLISHED, ARCHIVED
- Source Rules: R-BNDL-003
- Transitions:
  - DRAFT -> PUBLISHED on `publish`
  - PUBLISHED -> ARCHIVED on `archive`
